Firebase Auth (firebase-auth branch) not yet merged — Phase 2 Firestore sync requires UID

human_actions_pending.context: All Phase 1 sidebar code lives only in the worktree branch. Dev server runs from main repo. User can't see sidebar until merged.

decisions.decision: Sidebar slots into RootLayout alongside <Outlet /> — survives route transitions
decisions.rationale: Sidebar must persist across navigation without remounting

decisions.decision: localStorage key study_plan_v1 is authoritative for Phase 1; Firestore is Phase 2
decisions.rationale: Keeps Phase 1 scope tight and deliverable without auth dependency

decisions.decision: Quest status derived from attempts API, not a separate write path
decisions.rationale: Reuses existing attempts infrastructure; avoids duplicate state

decisions.decision: Multi-part question ✓ only when ALL graded parts have is_correct=true
decisions.rationale: CLAUDE.md rule; one correct part should not mark the whole question done

next_action: Run: cd /Users/chang/ProjectMath && git merge worktree-graceful-crafting-dusk, then restart frontend dev server. Then /gsd-plan-phase 2 to plan Firestore sync.
context_notes: Phase 1 is fully complete and all code review bugs fixed. The branch just needs to be merged into main so the user can see the sidebar in the running app. Phase 2 (Firestore sync) depends on the firebase-auth branch being available.
